# John A. Cairns — 2ad.com

> John A. Cairns is a Chicago-based software engineer with three decades in distributed
> systems and a background in physics, who builds smart contracts and multi-chain trading
> infrastructure in Rust and Solidity (Base, Arbitrum, Solana) — including Fabric, a
> high-performance DEX aggregator. He is also an enthusiastic amateur illustrator,
> photographer, and computer cartographer — he created the regional maps for six
> military-history books written by Brian Todd Carey (Pen & Sword / Westholme), from
> Warfare in the Ancient World through the Warfare in the Age of Crusades series — plus a LibriVox
> narrator, musician, and home baker. This site collects his writing on code, cryptography,
> craft, food, and more.

## About

- [About John](https://2ad.com/pages/about-john.html): Full bio — engineering focus, selected work, and links.
- [Cartography & Books](https://2ad.com/pages/cartography.html): The six military-history books John illustrated regional maps for, with covers and summaries.

## Focus areas

- Distributed software systems (three decades of experience)
- Smart contracts and on-chain trading infrastructure (Rust + Solidity, multi-chain)
- Rust systems programming and composable Unix command-line tools
- Applied cryptography and zero-knowledge proofs (interest / exploration)
- Computer-science fundamentals (Knuth's MMIX, data structures, algorithms)
- Illustration and computer cartography (regional maps for the Warfare in the Age of Crusades series)

## Selected projects

- [parsm](https://github.com/jac18281828/parsm): Structured-data processor for the CLI (JSON/CSV/YAML/TOML/logfmt/text); a friendlier superset of sed/awk/grep. Published on crates.io.
- [EMOM Timer](https://emomtimer.2ad.com): Precision drift-correcting workout timer in Rust + WebAssembly (Yew). Source: https://github.com/jac18281828/emomtimer
- [checksmix](https://github.com/jac18281828/checksmix): Fast emulator and assembler for Knuth's MMIX architecture.
- [snipren](https://github.com/jac18281828/snipren): Fast, intent-aware file rename utility for Unix pipelines.
- [Conversant Disruptor](https://github.com/conversant/disruptor): High-performance Java ring-buffer BlockingQueue (~320 stars). On Maven Central, packaged for Debian/Ubuntu, used by Apache Log4j 2 as an async-logging queue.
- [Collective Governance](https://github.com/collectivexyz/collective-governance-v1): Author of an on-chain Ethereum voting/consensus protocol (Solidity).
- [Fabric](https://benchmark.withfabric.xyz): High-performance multi-chain DEX aggregator (live benchmark).

## Writing

- [Technology posts](https://2ad.com/category/tech.html): Smart contracts, Solidity/Foundry, Rust, Go, zero-knowledge proofs, systems.
- [History](https://2ad.com/category/history.html): Medieval and crusades-era military history notes.
- [Food](https://2ad.com/category/food.html): Baking and recipes.
- [Books](https://2ad.com/category/books.html): The Warfare in the Age of Crusades series (regional cartography) and reading notes.
